name: e-insight
description: e-Insight — Enterprise Decision Support System for SIMPATI.KK

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:frontend && wrangler pages deploy frontend/dist --project-name=e-insight --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:pages:init: wrangler pages project create e-insight --production-branch main
scripts.fix: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run dev
